rationale: Keep this pair because the citing paper’s core question and findings are built around the RNP vs INP distinction, and its note explicitly says prior work had distinguished really new versus incrementally new products. The cited paper is directly about psychological newness and RNP/INP effects on purchase intentions/follow-through, making it a plausible foundational theory/source rather than an incidental mention; the DOI match is exact (10.1509/jmkr.45.3.307).
